training_status: active lifter, took time off during cycle

benefits.description: Significant reduction in chronic right anterior delt pain from overuse tear. Pain went from constant 24/7 to only occurring during overexertion. Several days of zero pain experienced. Can now sleep on injured shoulder without significant pain.
Anti-inflammatory effect noticed within first couple of days. Pain relief continued even 2 weeks after end of cycle.

protocol_notes: Injected directly into right side delt (localized injection to injury site). Injections approximately 6-8 hours apart. Also used CBD, magnesium oil, physical therapy, stretching, and weeks off from heavy lifting concurrently. Reports that BPC did not have systemic effect — left ankle pain was unaffected. Cycle cost approximately $150 for a couple vials.
